meta.name: A. A. M. Ashfatul Islam
meta.heroAbout: Frontend Developer focused on building responsive React interfaces, smooth user experiences, and production-ready web products.
meta.about: Frontend Developer with 3 years of experience building commercial web products using React, TypeScript, Next.js, and REST APIs. Served as the sole frontend developer for nearly two years, supporting 17+ products across SaaS, CodeCanyon, and client projects — converting 200+ Figma designs into responsive, production-ready interfaces. Built 6+ applications from scratch at work, plus multiple full-stack personal projects using Next.js 16, Supabase, and Tailwind CSS.

achievements.title: Frontend Ownership
achievements.description: Owned delivery across 17+ products (SaaS, CodeCanyon, and client projects) for nearly two years.

achievements.title: Product Development
achievements.description: Built 6+ applications at work and multiple full-stack projects independently.

achievements.title: UI & API Execution
achievements.description: Converted 200+ Figma designs and integrated 30+ REST APIs.

achievements.title: Modern Stack Adoption
achievements.description: Built full-stack apps with Next.js 16, TypeScript, and Supabase — deployed on Vercel.

impact: Served as the sole frontend developer, independently managing all UI deliverables across the entire product portfolio.
Shipped production features across diverse domains — LMS, e-commerce, accounting, and legal — balancing new builds with legacy maintenance.
Delivered ~50 React screens for LevelUp LMS with REST API integration, multilingual, and RTL support.
leadership: Led frontend planning and execution independently, balancing legacy Laravel Blade and modern React codebases.
Collaborated with designers, backend engineers, and product leadership to ship production-ready features on schedule.

projects.name: InfixLMS
projects.description: Enhanced LMS modules with responsive UI upgrades, bug fixes, and feature-ready frontend integration.

projects.name: InfixEdu
projects.description: Redesigned key pages, improved responsive behavior, and delivered production-ready templates for backend integration.

projects.name: LevelUp
projects.description: Built the student portal from scratch with ~50 responsive React screens, API-driven workflows, multilingual and RTL support.

projects.name: Lawcham
projects.description: Built legal workflow frontend from Figma to production with reusable React components and responsive layouts.

responsibilities: Built reusable React components for commercial web applications.
Translated 200+ Figma designs into responsive interfaces using React, JavaScript, SCSS, and Laravel Blade.
Integrated 30+ REST APIs using React Query, Context API, Axios, and React Hook Form.
Implemented multilingual, RTL, semantic HTML, and cross-browser support.
Optimized performance with lazy loading, code splitting, and memoization.
Collaborated with developers to identify and resolve software bugs across multiple products
Conducted manual and automated testing, contributing to testing strategies and documentation

personalProjects.description: Full-stack AI-powered mock interview platform with configurable coding/theory interviews, split-screen code editor, anti-cheat system, and AI-generated scorecards. Supports OpenAI, Gemini, and Ollama providers.
